problem:
Do I commit the package-lock.json file created by npm 5?.

npm 5 was released today and one of the new features include deterministic installs with the creation of a package-lock.json file.

Is this file supposed to be kept in source control?

I'm assuming it's similar to yarn.lo
memory_hint:
This is a known recurring issue. The temporary fix is: Do I commit the package-lock.json file created by npm 5?.

Yes, package-lock.json is intended to be checked into source control. If you're using npm 5+, you may see this notice on the c. This works for now but you will need to apply it again when the issue returns. The root cause is

npm 5 was released today and one of the new features include determinis.
